message:
perf(core): add #[inline] to animation and gesture hot-path accessors (bd-6visl)

Annotate 12 trivial field accessors with #[inline]:
- Spring: position, velocity, target, stiffness, damping, is_at_rest
- Timeline: state, current_time, duration, event_count
- GestureRecognizer: is_dragging, config

These are called per-frame during animation ticks and event handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
